ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are contextually relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in delivery, slightly affecting overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The response lacks immediate relevance to urgent needs of smuggling and prioritizing speed but maintains persona consistency, resulting in a balanced overall quality.
